# The Luxury Booths

> The Luxury Booths (TLB) is India's luxury photo booth experience brand, offering editorial, interactive, nostalgic, and instant-print photo experiences for premium weddings, corporate events, exhibitions, and brand activations. TLB is headquartered in Noida, Delhi NCR, founded in 2024, and operates pan-India.

Website: https://theluxurybooths.com

This file is a navigation index only. For complete knowledge, definitions, entity relationships, statistics, and the full glossary, see the [Complete AI Knowledge Base](https://theluxurybooths.com/llms-full.txt). For direct question-and-answer pairs, see the [FAQ Knowledge Base](https://theluxurybooths.com/llms-faq.txt).

## Company

- [About The Luxury Booths](https://theluxurybooths.com/about): Company overview, founding, headquarters, brand philosophy and mission.
- [Complete AI Knowledge Base (llms-full.txt)](https://theluxurybooths.com/llms-full.txt): Canonical knowledge base entity definitions, category knowledge, products, industry data, semantic relationships, glossary.
- [FAQ Knowledge Base (llms-faq.txt)](https://theluxurybooths.com/llms-faq.txt): Direct question-and-answer pairs about TLB, its products, and bookings.
- [Contact](https://theluxurybooths.com/contact): Phone, email, and address.

## Products

- [Magazine Photo Booth](https://theluxurybooths.com/magazine-photo-booth): Editorial, Vogue-style instant magazine cover photo experience. Flagship product.
- [Magazine Photo Booth — White-Label Business Opportunity](https://theluxurybooths.com/magazine-photo-booth/for-sale): Licensable business opportunity for event companies, photographers, and planners.
- [Mirror Photo Booth](https://theluxurybooths.com/mirror-photo-booth): Interactive touchscreen magic mirror with animations and instant prints.
- [Mirror Selfie Booth](https://theluxurybooths.com/mirror-selfie-booth): Accessible entry-level LED mirror booth.
- [Vintage Photo Booth](https://theluxurybooths.com/vintage-photo-booth): Handcrafted retro DSLR booth; positioned as a wedding return-gift alternative.
- [Strip Photo Booth](https://theluxurybooths.com/strip-photo-booth): Classic vertical photo strip booth, fast 15-second prints.
- [All Products](https://theluxurybooths.com/products): Full product catalog with package tiers and pricing.

## Solutions by Event Type

- [Photo Booth for Weddings](https://theluxurybooths.com/photo-booth-for-weddings): Wedding guest engagement and entertainment solutions.
- [Photo Booth for Corporate Events](https://theluxurybooths.com/photo-booth-for-corporate-events): Brand activation and employee engagement solutions.
- [Photo Booth for Exhibitions](https://theluxurybooths.com/photo-booth-for-exhibitions): Footfall and dwell-time solutions for trade shows.

City pages follow the pattern `/photo-booth-rental-in-{city}` and `/{product-slug}/{city}`.
